launchpad.title: Launchpad
launchpad.description: Launch your own token with optional presale support.
launchpad.connectDescription: Connect your wallet to access the launchpad.

tokenPage.title: Token Information
tokenPage.description: Define your token's identity and basic settings.

cards.title: Token Name
cards.description: The public display name of your token.
cards.help: Choose a unique, memorable name. This cannot be changed after deployment.

cards.title: Token Symbol
cards.description: A short ticker for exchanges and wallets.
cards.help: Usually 3-5 uppercase letters. This cannot be changed after deployment.

cards.title: Description
cards.description: Tell investors what your token is about.
cards.help: A good description helps build trust with potential investors.

cards.title: Enable Presale
cards.description: Run a fundraising phase before public launch.
cards.help: Presale lets early investors buy at a fixed price before the token is listed.

cards.title: Token Logo
cards.help: Use a square PNG or SVG image, ideally 256x256px or larger.

cards.title: Social Links
cards.description: Add your project's social media links.
cards.help: Social links help build trust and community around your token.

poolPage.title: Pool Setup
poolPage.description: Configure your token's liquidity pool and pricing.

cards.title: Floor Price (BNB)
cards.description: The minimum price your token can trade at.
cards.help: This sets the floor protection for your token's value.

cards.title: Total Supply
cards.description: The total number of tokens to be created.
cards.help: Higher supply means lower individual token price at the same market cap.

cards.title: Reserve Asset
cards.description: The asset paired with your token in the pool.
cards.help: Currently only WBNB is supported as a reserve asset.

cards.title: Protocol
cards.description: The DEX where your token will be listed.
cards.help: Choose the decentralized exchange for your token's liquidity pool.

presalePage.title: Presale Configuration
presalePage.description: Set up the presale parameters for your token.

cards.title: Presale Duration
cards.description: How long the presale will accept contributions.
cards.help: Longer presales give more time to reach your fundraising goals.

cards.title: Soft Cap Percentage
cards.description: Minimum percentage of hard cap needed for launch.
cards.help: If soft cap is not reached, contributors can claim refunds.

launchpad.presaleDisabled: Presale is disabled for this token. It will launch directly without a presale phase.

previewPage.title: Preview & Launch
previewPage.description: Review all details before deploying your token.

launchpad.deployNotice: Once deployed, your token will be live on the blockchain. This action is irreversible. Make sure all details are correct before proceeding.
launchpad.name: Name
